author: spencer_tb
content:
^^Our first test release for bal devnet 3 is out in alignment with: https://notes.ethereum.org/@ethpandaops/bal-devnet-3

EIP-8037 was a difficult EIP to integrate fully in the framework, so for this release we have skipped some of the [static tests](https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/9a5380949ee929bfe100174efa0a4bcc91e4547c/tests/static/amsterdam_skip_list.txt) (re-filled ethereum/tests yaml), as the logic required to update these failing tests is not possible within yaml. The solution for this is to fully port the yaml files to python which we have [draft PR](https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/pull/2321) for, as we can add the required 8037 logic to fix the tests once they are ported fully to python. As a result these skipped tests will be included in devnet-4, and we deem them not essential for devnet 3.

As always please ping for any issues or mismatches. We have not tested against any other EL client yet.

**New EIPs**
- EIP-7954: Increase Maximum Contract Size (https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/pull/2276)
- EIP-8037: State Creation Gas Cost Increase, **using a static `cost_per_state_byte` of 1174 for devnet-3 only** (https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/pull/2363)
  - EIP changes: https://github.com/ethereum/EIPs/pull/11328

**Note:** Hive will automatically pick this release up on the next run so if EL clients can prepare there devnet-3 branches (even if incomplete) it would help us get visablity on initial progress.
